title: Zappi Co Gingerbread Man Plush Toy – Soft and Cuddly Christmas Gingerbread Man Decoration (25cm height), Perfect for Festive Decor, and Stocking Fillers
features: Celebrate the holiday season with this adorable 25cm Gingerbread Man Plush Toy! Measuring 26x8x15cm, this cuddly Gingerbread Man is the perfect companion for adding festive charm to your home, office, or Christmas display.

Made from soft, high-quality materials, this plush Gingerbread Man is ideal for children and adults alike. Whether you're looking for a holiday gift, a decorative centerpiece, or a cozy addition to your living space, this Gingerbread Man toy will bring a smile to everyone's face.
Measuring 26x8x15cm, UK desgined by our little elfs in Warwickshire, England.

Holiday gifts: if you are also looking for a suitable holiday gift for your family and friends, please don't miss these stuffed toys with smiles on their faces, no one will refuse these adorable and sweet gifts
